description: Create a two-column guest perspective content slide on how a life sciences company built an ERM function, with a large left-side hero image and headline, supporting narrative text on the right, and a pull quote.

header.headline: How a life sciences company used a human-centric and nimble approach to build an ERM function
header.sub: Enterprise risk management and compliance leader at a global life sciences company

left.body: Guest perspective feature with a large hero illustration/photo of a life sciences professional in a lab setting.

items.text: Our company develops specialized drugs used for diagnosing and treating diseases such as cancer.
As an organization, we have a bias toward speed and action because of the niche space we occupy.
Our products must be produced to order.
